meta.title: arroyo.dev
meta.description: Gabriel Arroyo — front-end developer. React, TypeScript, and product-focused interfaces.

name: Gabriel Arroyo
bio: I build interfaces with React and TypeScript with product in mind: what the user needs to do, which states the app must hold, and where complexity actually lives.
I don’t stop at translating layouts. I structure complex state, integrate APIs, and prioritize maintainability, performance, and clear typed code.

projects.title: Arkhiveon
projects.description: Collaborative SaaS for RPG campaigns with authentication, PostgreSQL RLS permissions, and multi-user realtime sync. Global state with Zustand and dynamic forms with validation.

projects.title: Modular design system
projects.description: Typed, accessible component library with design tokens and Tailwind CSS — visual consistency without coupling styles to the product.

projects.title: Dense dashboards
projects.description: REST-backed interfaces built for fast loads: lazy loading, code splitting, and render control to avoid unnecessary updates.
